message:
feat: Auto-build precompiled objects on first run

No more manual `metal0 build-objects` needed! The compiler now:
1. Auto-builds .o files on first run (~3.7s one-time)
2. Auto-detects if source changed and rebuilds
3. Uses fast link for all subsequent builds (~0.74s)

How it works:
- ensurePrecompiledObjects() checks if .o files exist
- needsRebuild() compares source mtime vs .o mtime
- If missing or stale, rebuilds automatically
- Falls back to full compile if linking fails

Performance:
  First run:  ~3.7s (builds .o files + compiles)
  Later runs: ~0.74s (fast link only)
  Cached:     ~0.01s (binary exists)
